content: Explore: multi-item pipeline, HF FLUX edit interface, item edit page, ClosetItem schema
Add reconstructed_image_url + reconstruction_metadata to ClosetItem schema
Auto-repair in POST /closet/analyze for flagged crops (parallel via asyncio.gather)
Add POST /closet/{id}/repair endpoint for manual edit-page trigger
Frontend: AddItem.jsx shows AI-repaired badge and uses reconstructed crop
Frontend: add Repair button + hint input to ItemDetail.jsx with voice input
Add i18n keys for repair UI + badges
Frontend screenshot: AddItem repair badge + edit-page Repair button
